steps.title: Use the legacy clue
steps.content: The sentence says being first to do something is highly effective for creating a lasting historical legacy. The example of Lucia Pereira Rocha shows someone remembered because she was the first to achieve certain aviation milestones.

steps.title: Rule out mismatched verbs
steps.content: Choice A means acknowledge an existing legacy, not create one. Choice B means weaken it. Choice C means restrict it. None fits the idea of making a lasting legacy for oneself.

steps.title: Choose the creation verb
steps.content: The remaining verb means create or set up, which fits making a lasting historical legacy through first achievements. The answer is D.
